nodes.label: BEPI Platform
nodes.description: Piattaforma completa per la gestione di progetti spaziali: budget engineering, requirements, risks, scheduling, product tree, report generation, integrazioni esterne.

nodes.label: BEPI Architecture
nodes.description: Backend Python/FastAPI + Streamlit frontend (unico runtime dopo 2026-06-10) + Supabase PostgreSQL con RLS. Deploy su Streamlit Cloud.

nodes.label: bepi.core
nodes.description: Modulo Python con models.py (SQLAlchemy), schemas.py (Pydantic), enums.py (ECSS, risk levels).

nodes.label: bepi.services
nodes.description: Modulo con budgets.py, requirements.py, risks.py, scheduling.py, reports.py: logica di business per BEPI.

nodes.label: bepi.integrations
nodes.description: Integrazioni esterne: GMAT, FreeFlyer, MATLAB, thermal/power models, orbit viz, LCA, SPENVIS, DRAMA.

nodes.label: bepi.ecss
nodes.description: Modulo per compliance ECSS: standards, margins, phases, reviews, subsystems.

nodes.label: Streamlit Dashboard
nodes.description: Dashboard self-contained con 11 pagine (Overview, Product Tree, Budgets, Requirements, Risks, Schedule, ECSS, Reports, Integrations, Warehouse, Team), multi-mission, password-protected.

nodes.label: Next.js Frontend (ARCHIVIATO)
nodes.description: Frontend Next.js archiviato il 2026-06-10 sul branch archive/nextjs-frontend. Non più mantenuto, rimosso da main. Runtime attuale: solo Streamlit.

nodes.label: Supabase PostgreSQL
nodes.description: Database Supabase con 20+ tabelle, Row Level Security per multi-mission RBAC, 8 ruoli (ADMIN, PM, SE, SSL, QA, CM, AIT, USER), Edge Functions, real-time subscriptions.

nodes.label: Table: missions
nodes.description: Tabella Supabase con metadata missioni.

nodes.label: Table: requirements
nodes.description: Tabella requirements con verification e coverage.

nodes.label: Table: risks
nodes.description: Tabella risk items con mitigation e FMECA.

nodes.label: Table: tasks
nodes.description: Tabella WBS tasks con CPM (Critical Path Method).

nodes.label: Table: product_tree_nodes
nodes.description: Tabella gerarchica del product tree.

nodes.label: Table: equip_budgets
nodes.description: Tabella equipment mass/power budgets.

nodes.label: Table: approval_log
nodes.description: Tabella change approval workflow.

nodes.label: Table: email_queue
nodes.description: Tabella coda invio email inviti.

nodes.label: Table: team_members
nodes.description: Tabella user roles per missione.

nodes.label: Table: warehouse_items
nodes.description: Tabella procurement tracking.

nodes.label: Table: procurement_orders
nodes.description: Tabella purchase orders.

nodes.label: Bug: Duplicati budget (Edit Equipment)
nodes.description: Editor Edit Equipment salvava con .upsert() ma budgets non aveva vincolo UNIQUE -> ogni Save inseriva una riga nuova. Fix: update-then-insert + UNIQUE (node_id, budget_type).

nodes.label: Bug: Logout/perdita dati dopo ~1h
nodes.description: get_supabase() non risalava token rinnovati e usava JWT scaduto per PostgREST -> F5 sloggava. Fix: token freschi in session_state + cookie 7gg (streamlit-cookies-controller).

nodes.label: Email inviti su Brevo
nodes.description: Edge Function send-invitation usa Brevo (300 mail/gg free). Fallback graceful: se email fallisce, codice invito mostrato in UI. CAVEAT: Brevo filtra per IP, lasciare vuota allowlist.

nodes.label: S1: Ruolo default onboarding
nodes.description: Onboarding non assegna più ADMIN di default a utente senza membership -> default USER (least privilege). Resta ADMIN della missione che crea.

nodes.label: S6: check_password() gate
nodes.description: check_password() era chiamata ma non definita (NameError nel branch senza Supabase). Ora è un vero gate password per dev locale, fail-closed.

nodes.label: S2: Edge Function send-invitation validata
nodes.description: Era un relay email aperto. Ora valida server-side l'invite_code su tabella invitations e invia solo all'email registrata + escape HTML + CORS ristretto.

nodes.label: P1: Cache product tree
nodes.description: _get_product_tree() rileggeva l'intera tabella a ogni chiamata (~18x/render); ora serve cache e ricarica solo su primo load/cambio missione/force_reload/nodo aggiunto.

nodes.label: P2: Cache client Supabase
nodes.description: get_service_client() è @st.cache_resource; client utente creato una volta per sessione (era create_client 40-100x/render). set_session resta per-call.

nodes.label: C1/C3: Rimozione codice morto
nodes.description: Rimosse 416 righe di onboarding duplicato mai chiamato; frontend Next.js (~6k LOC) archiviato su archive/nextjs-frontend e tolto da main.

nodes.label: I1: Schema SQL rigenerato
nodes.description: supabase/schema.sql rigenerato dal DB live: 22 tabelle, 25 enum, 79 policy RLS, 5 funzioni, 18 trigger. Cambiare via migration, poi rigenerare.

nodes.label: I2: CI workflow
nodes.description: Aggiunto .github/workflows/ci.yml (compileall + pytest) + conftest.py (pytest senza PYTHONPATH=src) + requirements-dev.txt.

nodes.label: Bug aperti (deliberato)
nodes.description: S5 RLS split-brain team_members vs mission_members + S4 togliere service client dalle azioni utente + C2 rimozione bridge JS/modal product-tree + P4 batch upsert budget + test sui bug fix.

nodes.label: Streamlit Cloud Deploy
nodes.description: Deploy principale: auto-deploy dal branch main. Comando run: streamlit run streamlit_app.py.

nodes.label: GitHub Actions CI
nodes.description: Workflow .github/workflows/ci.yml: trigger su push main e pull_request. Esegue compileall su streamlit_app.py e src/, poi pytest. Python 3.13. Protegge deploy live.

nodes.label: Runtime dependencies
nodes.description: requirements.txt: streamlit, streamlit-cookies-controller, supabase, httpx, plotly, pandas, numpy, scipy, openpyxl, streamlit-option-menu, streamlit-antd-components, streamlit-extras, streamlit-plotly-events, jinja2, postgrest, realtime, storage3, gotrue.

nodes.label: Dev dependencies
nodes.description: requirements-dev.txt: pytest>=8.0 e ruff>=0.6. Per CI e sviluppo, non per esecuzione app.

nodes.label: docker-compose (PostgreSQL locale)
nodes.description: docker-compose.yml: servizio postgres:16 su porta 5432, env vars POSTGRES_USER/PASSWORD/DB con default 'bepi'. Volume persistente postgres_data e healthcheck pg_isready.

nodes.label: Comandi locali
nodes.description: Command.md: comandi per setup locale Streamlit, installazione pacchetti LaTeX, Colima per macOS 12.

nodes.label: Setup Claude Code per Matteo
nodes.description: SETUP_CLAUDE_MATTEO.md: hook git pull automatico su SessionStart + workflow git per Federico/Matteo. settings.json non su git.

nodes.label: Setup Email Invitations
nodes.description: SETUP_EMAILS.md: setup Edge Function send-invitation con Resend (100 mail/gg free). NOTA: nel 2026-06-10 audit si è passati a Brevo.

nodes.label: Report Sicurezza
nodes.description: report-sicurezza.md: analisi del 2026-05-06 (agg. 2026-06-20). Livello rischio ALTO. 3 vulnerabilità critiche (credenziali in .claude/settings.local.json, DB remoto, XSS) e 3 medie (XSS in streamlit_app.py, command injection in matlab_bridge.py, auth inadeguata).

nodes.label: Vuln Critica: Esposizione credenziali
nodes.description: Token esposti in .claude/settings.local.json: Supabase JWT Anon Key, Vercel API Token, PostgreSQL password. Raccomandazione: revoca entro 24h + rimozione file + gitignore.

nodes.label: Vuln Media: XSS potenziale in streamlit_app.py
nodes.description: Uso estensivo di unsafe_allow_html=True in st.markdown() in streamlit_app.py (18+ linee).
nodes.norm_label: vuln media: xss potenziale in streamlit_app.py

nodes.label: Vuln Media: Command injection matlab_bridge
nodes.description: Costruzione comando subprocess in src/bepi/services/matlab_bridge.py:126 con concatenazione stringhe -> possibile esecuzione arbitraria se path controllato da input utente.

nodes.label: Vuln Media: Autenticazione inadeguata
nodes.description: streamlit_app.py:45-60: single-password confronto stringa diretta, no hashing, no rate limiting, no logout automatico, RBAC client-side.

nodes.label: Remember.md Snapshot 2026-06-20
nodes.description: docs/archive/REMEMBER_2026-06.md: snapshot del Remember.md rimosso il 2026-06-20 con stato di ogni punto della to-do list di Matteo.

nodes.label: TODO: DB Budget Edit Equipment (RISOLTO)
nodes.description: Risolto 2026-06-20: bepi/budgets.py update-then-insert + migration UNIQUE (node_id, budget_type).

nodes.label: TODO: Latenza product tree (PARZIALMENTE RISOLTO)
nodes.description: Risolto parzialmente con P1 (cache). Latenza residua è round-trip DB normale.

nodes.label: TODO: Role Permission (RISOLTO)
nodes.description: Permission audit completato (tab_permissions in page_team).

nodes.label: TODO: Cookie SSO (NON IMPLEMENTATO)
nodes.description: Cookie per login con Google/Microsoft/SSO. Fuori scope. Streamlit usa streamlit-cookies-controller solo per refresh token.

nodes.label: TODO: Send Invitation Mail (RISOLTO)
nodes.description: Edge Function validata server-side + Brevo (non Resend).

nodes.label: Streamlit Refactoring Plan
nodes.description: STREAMLIT_REFACTORING.md: piano 2026-06-20 per scomporre streamlit_app.py (6690 righe, 388KB, 53 funzioni) in moduli per sezione. Struttura target: streamlit/ con _bootstrap, _layout, _settings, _state, _loaders, _mock_data, _badges, _mission, _pt_actions + pages/ con overview, product_tree, budgets, requirements, risks, schedule, ecss, reports, warehouse, team, integrations/.

nodes.label: streamlit/_bootstrap.py
nodes.description: Modulo: session_state init + onboarding gate. Chiamato PRIMA del router.

nodes.label: streamlit/_layout.py
nodes.description: Modulo: sidebar (logo, nav, mission selector, user badge). Range attuale 898-1137.

nodes.label: streamlit/_settings.py
nodes.description: Modulo: Settings panel + manage missions (CRUD missioni, 'Delete All'). Range 1010-1222.

nodes.label: streamlit/_pt_actions.py
nodes.description: Modulo: dispatcher _process_product_tree_action + @st.dialog per product tree (unico punto del progetto).

nodes.label: streamlit/_state.py
nodes.description: Modulo: accessor session_state (get_tasks, get_requirements, get_risks, get_effective_risks, get_approval_log, get_req_ownership, get_task_assignments, get_team).

nodes.label: streamlit/_loaders.py
nodes.description: Modulo: _get_product_tree, _get_equip_budgets, _build_budget_tree, _normalize_fmeca_entries. Caching read dal DB.

nodes.label: streamlit/_mock_data.py
nodes.description: Modulo: tutti i mock_* (mock_product_tree_flat, mock_requirements, mock_risks, mock_fmeca, mock_tasks, _get_mock_team) per dev offline.

nodes.label: streamlit/_badges.py
nodes.description: Modulo: get_member, member_badge, approval_badge, get_latest_approval.

nodes.label: streamlit/_mission.py
nodes.description: Modulo: lifecycle missione (_default_mission_data, _save_current_mission, _map_mission, _mission_from_db_row, _current_user_member, _activate_local_mission, _load_mission).

nodes.label: streamlit/pages/
nodes.description: Package con 11 moduli pagina: overview, product_tree, budgets, requirements, risks, schedule, ecss, reports, warehouse, team + integrations/.

nodes.label: streamlit/pages/integrations/
nodes.description: Subpages: common, gmat, freeflyer, matlab, thermal, power, orbit_viz, lca, spenvis, drama, validation.

nodes.label: tests/test_streamlit_imports.py
nodes.description: Smoke test: importa ogni modulo streamlit/pages/*.py, verifica che espongano main() callabile.

nodes.label: scripts/check_streamlit_structure.py
nodes.description: AST check pre-commit: blocca se st.* o st.session_state.* a top-level nelle pagine, o se moduli pagina importano da streamlit/pages/.

nodes.label: Roadmap Fasi BEPI
nodes.description: Roadmap: Fase 1 core engine, Fase 2 report+MATLAB+Excel, Fase 3 integrazioni+ESA/NASA, Fase 4 Next.js(archiviato)+Supabase+Streamlit Cloud, Fase 5 multi-mission RBAC. Future: Fase 6 mobile, 7 AI, 8 multi-org, 9 plugin.

nodes.label: RBAC 8 ruoli
nodes.description: Multi-mission RBAC: ADMIN, PM, SE, SSL, QA, CM, AIT, USER. Default ruolo USER (least privilege) dopo S1.
